name: cbdMD, Inc.
business: cbdMD owns and operates CBD brands cbdMD, Paw CBD, functional mushroom brand ATRx Labs, and THC beverage brand Herbal Oasis. It sells hemp-derived cannabinoid products containing CBD, CBG, CBN, and trace THC. Products are sold directly to consumers via e-commerce and to wholesalers.

exposures.sentence: We own and operate the nationally recognized CBD (cannabidiol) brands cbdMD, Paw CBD as well as the functional mushroom brand ATRx Labs and emerging THC beverage brand Herbal Oasis.
We record product sales primarily through two main delivery channels, direct to consumers via our E-commerce sales and direct to wholesalers utilizing our internal sales team.
